basic_details.job_title: OUAT Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Young Professional, Field and Lab helper and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT)
basic_details.post_name: Consultant, Young Professional, Field and Lab. helper
basic_details.short_information: Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT) has released the official Consultant, Young Professional, and Field and Lab. Helper Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the OUAT Recruitment 2026 on a project basis. Eligible candidates meeting the prescribed age limits and possessing qualifications such as Retired Professor (Soil Science), M.Sc. (Ag) in Soil Science, or Matriculation can attend the walk-in interview on 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

content_sections.heading: OUAT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OUAT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OUAT Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Consultant: Retired Professor (Soil Science) Young Professional: M.Sc. (Ag) Soil Science Field and Lab. helper: Matriculation

content_sections.heading: OUAT Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Consultant: Maximum 70 years Young Professional: Maximum 35 years Field and Lab. helper: Maximum 45 years

content_sections.heading: OUAT Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consultant: ₹50,000/- per month (Consolidated) Young Professional: ₹35,000/- per month (Consolidated) Field and Lab. helper: ₹18,000/- per month (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for OUAT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for OUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the OUAT Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 31 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in OUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: OUAT is recruiting for the posts of Consultant, Young Professional, and Field and Lab. helper. There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Field and Lab. helper post?
faq.answer: For the Field and Lab. helper position, candidates must have completed Matriculation (10th pass). This is the minimum educational requirement for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional post is 35 years. Candidates exceeding this age are not eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Consultant post will receive a consolidated salary of ₹50,000/- per month. This is a project-based position.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the OUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, bio-data, passport size photographs, self-attested copies of certificates and mark sheets, proof of age, and a valid photo ID.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for OUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for any of the posts in this OUAT recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these OUAT posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant, Young Professional, and Field and Lab. helper posts will be based on a Walk-in-Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT), Bhubaneswar. The specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for OUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the OUAT Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 31 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well before the scheduled time.
